title: Subway Sadie
writer: Mildred Cram, Adele Comandini, Paul Schofield
actors: Dorothy Mackaill, Jack Mulhall, Charles Murray
plot: Sadie Hermann, employed in a big New York fur store, dreams of escaping from the early-morning alarm clock and the twice-a-day subway crush. One night in a subway jam she is catapulted into the arms of Herbert McCarthy, a subway g...
